---
title: "The Life and Achievements of Edward Henry Palmer, late Lord Almoner\'s professor of Arabic in the University of Cambridge and fellow of Saint John\'s College"
---

## The Life and Achievements of Edward Henry Palmer, late Lord Almoner\'s professor of Arabic in the University of Cambridge and fellow of Saint John\'s College

**Author:** Walter Besant
**Date:** 1883
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
